Jerry Springer says still deciding whether will run for Ohio governor 2018.
Speculation around Springer’s potential gubernatorial bid has been growing for several months.
The Enquirer also reported Wednesday that Springer soliciting feedback from Ohio State Sen. Sandra Williams, Democratic Reps. Janine Boyd and Stephanie Howse, and political consultants.
“Glad attendance rep’s Stephanie Howse and Janine Boyd fundraiser w/Jerry Springer, possible candidate for Gov. Ohio,” Williams tweeted Tuesday.
“He’s very serious,” Williams said Springer’s interest running, interview with Cleveland.com.
The fundraiser was held Nighttown, Cleveland Heights jazz club and restaurant.
Ring said Springer gave brief speech the fundraiser.
Springer, 73, previously considered running for Senate 2000 and 2004, but decided against it.
has previously attributed the rumors around his potential bid for governor former reality star Donald Trump’s successful White House bid.
But people continued discuss Springer’s potential return politics.
late May, Business Insider, citing more than half dozen Democrats familiar with the race, reported influential Ohio Democrats including former Ohio Gov. Ted Strickland and Hamilton County Democratic Party Chairman Tim Burke pushed for Springer run.
interview with CNN’s Brooke Baldwin May 2016, Springer who supported Democrat Hillary Clinton 2016 was seemingly unsurprised Trump’s popularity. said that since President Ronald Reagan, generation Americans has grown believing government the problem America.
“The celebrity politics was inevitable,” Springer said.
Since Trump’s win, growing number celebrities have expressed interest running for office, have not ruled out pursuing politics the future.
think it’s real possibility,” Johnson told the publication when asked would ever run.

original text:
It’s continuation trend they have seen over the last several years.
“It’s been almost three years nothing but above normal temperatures for the most part,” Zierden told the Bradenton Herald phone inteview Monday.
noted that the last consecutive months have all been warmer than what considered normal.
Tampa one the weather stations showing record warm ranking, according second tweet from Zierden.
According the Florida Climate Center, the average temperature Tampa during November was 72.1 degrees, three degrees warmer than normal.
Most the state exhibited similar, trend.
“All that consistent with what other parts the world have seen and what expect with climate change, and would certainly think climate change has its fingerprints the recent trend above-normal temperatures,” Zierden said.
Manatee County, there were nine high temperatures through November, according NCEI daily weather records. Six days through November tied for record- high temperatures.
However, Zierden cautioned, just because the average temperatures have been warmer doesn’t mean Florida won’t see cold snaps this winter.
Across the country, it’s been above-average year for temperatures, the report from the National Centers for Environmental Information shows.
The year-to-date U.S. average temperature, 56.4 degrees, was the third warmest record. That’s 2.61 degrees above the 20th century average, according the NCEI.
The warmest year record for the U.S. was 2012, when the average temperature through November was 57.04 degrees, NCEI archives show.
Spectrum Bay News Meteorologist Josh Linker said average temperatures will likely remain above average least through Christmas, but just couple degrees each day. Temperatures, however, return average for the last few days the year.
Linker said December currently averaging less than degree above normal, due part recent week cooler weather.

original text:
The day drawing near when the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church will celebrate the fourth centenary the union between the Bishops the Metropolia Kievan Rus' and the Apostolic See. The union was effected the meeting the Metropolia Kiev with the Pope December 1595 and was solemnly proclaimed Brest-Litovsk the River Bug October 1596. Pope Clement VIII, the Apostolic Constitution Magnus Dominus laudabilis nimis,1 announced the union the whole Church and the Apostolic Letter Benedictus sit Pastor2 addressed the Bishops the Metropolia, informing them that the union had taken place.
The Union Brest opened new page the history the Greek Catholic Church Ukraine.4 Today that Church wishes sing with joy hymn thanksgiving and praise the One who, once more, has brought back from death life, and wishes set forth with renewed enthusiasm the path marked out the Second Vatican Council.
Joining the faithful the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church this thanksgiving and petition are the Greek Catholic Churches the diaspora which date back the Union Brest, together with the other Eastern Catholic Churches and the entire Church.
the Bishop Rome, too wish unite myself the Catholics the Byzantine tradition those lands. For many years, during pastoral ministry Poland, sensed physical well spiritual closeness with that Church, which was then undergoing such difficult trials. After election the See Peter, considered pressing duty, following the example Predecessors, speak out defence its right exist and freely profess its faith, time when both these rights were being denied. now have the privilege joyfully sharing its celebration these days regained freedom.
The celebrations commemorating the Union Brest must seen the context the Millennium the Baptism the Rus'. Seven years ago, 1988, that event was celebrated with great solemnity. For the occasion published two documents: the Apostolic Letter Euntes mundum January 1988,5 for the whole Church, and the Message Magnum Baptismi donum, February the same year,6 addressed Ukrainian Catholics. was occasion for celebrating moment fundamental importance for the Christian and cultural identity those peoples, moment unique significance, since that time the Churches the Byzantine tradition and the Church Rome were still living full communion.
After the division which damaged the unity between the West and the Byzantine East, frequent and intense efforts were made restore full communion. wish mention two particularly significant events: the Second Council Lyons 1274, and above all the Council Florence 1439, when protocols union with the Eastern Churches were signed. Unfortunately, various causes prevented the promise and potential those agreements from being realized.
The Bishops the Metropolia Kiev, restoring communion with Rome, made explicit reference the decisions the Council Florence, Council which had numbered among its participants from the Patriarchate
this context, the figure Metropolitan Isidore Kiev stands out. faithful interpreter and defender the decisions that Council, had endure exile for his convictions.
The Bishops who promoted the union and the members their Church retained lively awareness their original close ties their Orthodox brethren, together with full consciousness the Oriental identity their Metropolia, identity which was also upheld after the union. the history the Catholic Church, highly significant fact that this just desire was respected and that the act union did not involve passing over the Latin tradition, some thought would happen. Their Church saw its right governed its own hierarchy with specific discipline and maintain its Eastern liturgical and spiritual heritage.
After the union, the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church enjoyed period which its structures flourished, with resulting benefits for religious life, the education the clergy and the spiritual commitment the faithful. With remarkable great importance was attached education. Thanks the valuable contribution the Basilian Order and other Religious Congregations, there was great growth the study the sacred sciences and the nation's culture. the present century, figure extraordinary prestige, this regard well his witness suffering borne for Christ, was Metropolitan Andrii Sheptyckyi, whose education and fine spiritual qualities were combined with outstanding gifts. founded schools and academies, supported theological studies and the human sciences, the press and sacred art, and sought preserve historical memories.
And yet, all this ecclesial vitality was continually marked the tragedy and opposition. illustrious victim this regard was the Archbishop Polock and Vitebsk, Josaphat Kuntsevych, whose martyrdom merited the unfading crown eternal glory. His body now lies the Vatican Basilica, where continuously venerated with devotion and gratitude Catholics from throughout the world.
Outstanding among the heroic witnesses the rights not only the faith but also human conscience those difficult years the figure Metropolitan Josyf Slipyj: his courage enduring exile and prison for years and his indomitable confidence the resurrection his Church make him one the most powerful figures among the confessors the faith our time. Nor should his many companions punishment forgotten, particularly Bishops Hryhory Khomyshyn and Josaphat Kocylowskyj.
These tempestuous events shook the Church the homeland its roots. But Divine Providence had already begun make possible for many its members find way escape for themselves and their people. From the beginning the 19th century onwards, great waves emigrants began cross the ocean, settling above all Canada, the United States America, Brazil, Argentina and Australia. The Holy See took care close them, providing assistance and establishing pastoral structures for them their new homes, including the establishment their own Eparchies. the time trial, during the atheistic persecution their native land, the voice these believers could thus raised, full freedom, with strength and courage. the international forum they defended the right their persecuted brethren religious freedom, and thus strengthened the Second Vatican Council's appeal for religious freedom,8 and the efforts made this regard the Holy See.
The whole Catholic Community recalls with deep emotion the victims such great suffering: the martyrs and confessors the faith the Church Ukraine offer magnificent lesson fidelity even the price life itself. And we, the favoured witnesses their sacrifice, are aware that they helped maintain the dignity world which seemed overwhelmed atrocities. They knew the truth, and the truth set them free. Christians Europe and throughout the world, pausing prayer before the concentration camps and prisons, should grateful for the light which they gave: was the light Christ, which they caused shine the darkness. For long years the darkness seemed the eyes the world prevail, but was not able extinguish that light, which was the light God and the light man, wounded but not laid low.
This inheritance suffering and glory today stands historic crossroads: now that the chains imprisonment have been broken, the Greek Catholic Church Ukraine has begun again breathe freedom and regain fully its own active role the Church and history. This task, difficult yet providential, today calls for particular reflection, that may carried out with wisdom and
The celebration the Union Brest should lived and interpreted the light the teachings the Second Vatican Council. This perhaps the most important aspect for understanding the significance the anniversary.
well known that the Second Vatican Council made special point studying the mystery the Church, and that one the most important documents which produced was the Constitution Lumen gentium. Precisely because this detailed study the Council takes particular ecumenical significance. This confirmed the Decree Unitatis redintegratio, which presents very enlightened programme activities carried out the work for Christian unity. Thirty years after the conclusion the Council, wished reiterate this programme with Encyclical Letter unum sint, published May this year.9 This Encyclical traces the ecumenical progress which has been made since the Second Vatican Council and, the same time, looking the third millennium the Christian era, seeks open new possibilities for the future.
Putting the celebrations the coming year the context reflection the Church, proposed the Council, anxious above all encourage deeper understanding the proper role which the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church called play today the ecumenical movement.
promote dialogue with the Byzantine Orthodox Churches, there was set up, after the Second Vatican Council, special Mixed Commission which also included among its members the Eastern Catholic Churches.
various documents efforts have been made arrive deeper and greater understanding between the Orthodox Churches and the Eastern Catholic Churches, efforts which have not been without positive results. Apostolic Letter Orientale lumen11 and Encyclical Letter unum sint12 have already written the elements and truth13 common Eastern and Western Christianity, and the desirable path follow the search for full communion between the Catholic Church and the Orthodox Churches, the light the greater understanding brought about the Second Vatican Council: "Today know that unity can achieved through the love God only the Churches want together, full respect for the traditions each and for necessary autonomy. know that this can take place only the basis the love Churches which feel increasingly called manifest the one Church Christ, born from one Baptism and from one Eucharist, and which want sisters".14 The deepening knowledge the doctrine the Church, brought about the Council and continuing since the Council, has marked out what can called new path the journey unity: the path the dialogue truth nourished and sustained the dialogue charity (cf. Eph 15).
The shift from underground existence has meant radical change the situation the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church: this Church has found itself facing the grave problems rebuilding the structures which had been completely deprived and, more generally, has had commit itself rediscovering itself fully, not only from within, but also relation the other Churches.
Thanks God for having enabled celebrate this jubilee with religious freedom regained. Thanks God also for the growth the dialogue charity, whereby significant progress has been made the road the much desired with the Orthodox Churches.
Numerous migrations and deportations have redrawn the religious geography those lands; many years official State atheism have profoundly affected people's minds; there still not enough clergy respond the immense needs religious and moral these are some the more dramatic challenges facing all the Churches.
the face these difficulties common witness charity required, order that the proclamation the Gospel may not impeded. said Apostolic Letter Orientale lumen, "today can co-operate proclaiming the Kingdom can become the upholders new divisions".15 May the Lord guide our feet into the way peace.
the new-found freedom cannot forget the persecution and martyrdom which the Churches that region, both Catholic and Orthodox, suffered their own flesh. This important aspect for the Church all times, recalled Apostolic Letter Tertio millennio adveniente.16 concerns particularly significant heritage the Churches Europe, which remain profoundly marked it: this needs studied the light the Word God.
Remembrance the martyrs cannot erased from the memory the Church humanity: whether victims the ideologies the East the West, all them are brought together fellowship the violence whereby hatred for the faith violated the dignity the human person, created God "in his image and likeness".
Pope John XXIII was fond repeating: "What unites much greater than what divides us". convinced that this attitude can great benefit all the Churches. More than years have gone since the Pope made this statement. this period time there have been many indications which suggest that Christians have made progress this direction. Eloquent signs this progress have been the fraternal meetings between Pope Paul and the Ecumenical Patriarch Athenagoras and those which myself have had with the Ecumenical Patriarchs Dimitrios and, more recently, Bartholomaios, and with other venerable Patriarchs the Churches the East. All this, together with the many initiatives involving meetings and dialogue which are being promoted everywhere the Church, encourages have hope: the Holy Spirit, the Spirit unity, does not cease work among Christians still separated from one another.
And yet human weakness and sin continue resist the Spirit unity. Sometimes one even has the impression that there are forces ready almost anything order slow down, and even put end to, the movement towards Christian unity. But cannot give in: daily must find the courage and strength, which one and the same time are the gift the Spirit and the result human effort, continue the path already undertaken.
10. recalling the Union Brest must ask ourselves what this event means today. was union which concerned only particular geographical region, but relevant for the entire field ecumenism. The Eastern Catholic Churches can make very important contribution ecumenism. The Council's Decree Orientalium Ecclesiarum reminds that "the Eastern Churches communion with the Apostolic See Rome have special role play promoting the unity all Christians, particularly Easterners, according the principles this sacred Synod's Decree Ecumenism: first all prayer, then the example their lives, religious fidelity ancient Eastern traditions, greater mutual knowledge, collaboration, and brotherly regard for objects and attitudes".20 From this follows that Eastern Catholics are commit themselves living profoundly what the Decree lays out. They are asked make confession faith full humility and gratitude the Holy Spirit, who guides the Church towards the fulfilment promised her the Redeemer the world.
11. Prayer will therefore the fundamental element which should mark the celebration this jubilee. Such prayer above all involves giving thanks for all that has been accomplished, down the centuries, commitment the Church's unity, and especially for the impulse given the search for unity result the Second Vatican Council.
This prayer one thanksgiving the Lord, who guides the unfolding history, for the situation new-found religious freedom which this jubilee being celebrated. also appeal the that may cause flourish everything which promotes unity, and may give courage and strength all those who commit themselves, according the guidelines the Council's Decree Unitatis redintegratio, this work blessed God. plea for the gift brotherly love, and for the forgiveness offences and injustices suffered the course history. petition that the power the living God will bring good even out the cruel and many-faceted evil caused acts human malice. This prayer also expresses hope for the future the ecumenical journey: the power God greater than all human weaknesses, whether old new. this jubilee the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church, the threshold the third millennium, marks step forward towards full Christian unity, this result will first all the work the Holy Spirit.
12. The jubilee celebrations should also time reflection. The Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church must first all ask itself what full communion with the Apostolic See meant for the past, and what will mean for the future. spirit humble thanksgiving, the Greek Catholic Church will give glory God, for its heroic fidelity the Successor Peter and, under the action the Holy Spirit, will understand that today this same fidelity commits fostering the unity all the Churches. This fidelity cost sufferings and martyrdom the past: this sacrifice offered God order implore the hoped-for union.
13. cannot fail entrust the yearning for full Christian unity the Mother Christ, she who ever present the work the Lord and his Church. Chapter Eight the Dogmatic Constitution Lumen gentium points her the one who goes before our earthly pilgrimage faith and tenderly present the Church which, the end the second millennium, working re-establish among all those who believe Christ that unity which the Lord wills for them. Because she the Mother the one Christ, she the Mother unity. Since Mary, the power the Holy Spirit, gave birth the Son God, who received from her his human body, she ardently wills the visible unity all believers who make the Mystical Body Christ. The veneration Mary, which unites East and West intimately, will serve, convinced, the cause unity.
The Most Holy Virgin, already present everywhere our midst both many sacred buildings and the life faith many families continuously speaks unity, unity for which she constantly intercedes. today, commemorating the Union Brest, recall the marvellous wealth veneration that the Christian people the Ukraine have offered the Mother God, cannot but draw from this admiration for the history, spirituality and prayer those peoples the consequences for unity which are closely linked those treasures.
Mary, who has inspired their trials fathers and mothers, young people, the sick and the aged; Mary, the column fire capable guiding many martyrs the faith, certainly work preparing the hoped-for union all Christians: the light this, the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church certainly has its own role play.
Mary the Church offers her thanks and asks her make share her concern for unity. With filial trust let abandon ourselves her, that may with her where God will all all.
you, dear Brothers and Sisters, impart Apostolic Blessing.

The Holy See took care close them, providing assistance and establishing pastoral structures for them their new homes, including the establishment their own Eparchies. the time trial, during the atheistic persecution their native land, the voice these believers could thus raised, full freedom, with strength and courage. the international forum they defended the right their persecuted brethren religious freedom, and thus strengthened the Second Vatican Council's appeal for religious freedom,8 and the efforts made this regard the Holy See.
The whole Catholic Community recalls with deep emotion the victims such great suffering: the martyrs and confessors the faith the Church Ukraine offer magnificent lesson fidelity even the price life itself. And we, the favoured witnesses their sacrifice, are aware that they helped maintain the dignity world which seemed overwhelmed atrocities. They knew the truth, and the truth set them free. Christians Europe and throughout the world, pausing prayer before the concentration camps and prisons, should grateful for the light which they gave: was the light Christ, which they caused shine the darkness. For long years the darkness seemed the eyes the world prevail, but was not able extinguish that light, which was the light God and the light man, wounded but not laid low.
This inheritance suffering and glory today stands historic crossroads: now that the chains imprisonment have been broken, the Greek Catholic Church Ukraine has begun again breathe freedom and regain fully its own active role the Church and history. This task, difficult yet providential, today calls for particular reflection, that may carried out with wisdom and
The celebration the Union Brest should lived and interpreted the light the teachings the Second Vatican Council. This perhaps the most important aspect for understanding the significance the anniversary.
well known that the Second Vatican Council made special point studying the mystery the Church, and that one the most important documents which produced was the Constitution Lumen gentium. Precisely because this detailed study the Council takes particular ecumenical significance. This confirmed the Decree Unitatis redintegratio, which presents very enlightened programme activities carried out the work for Christian unity. Thirty years after the conclusion the Council, wished reiterate this programme with Encyclical Letter unum sint, published May this year.9 This Encyclical traces the ecumenical progress which has been made since the Second Vatican Council and, the same time, looking the third millennium the Christian era, seeks open new possibilities for the future.
Putting the celebrations the coming year the context reflection the Church, proposed the Council, anxious above all encourage deeper understanding the proper role which the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church called play today the ecumenical movement.
promote dialogue with the Byzantine Orthodox Churches, there was set up, after the Second Vatican Council, special Mixed Commission which also included among its members the Eastern Catholic Churches.
various documents efforts have been made arrive deeper and greater understanding between the Orthodox Churches and the Eastern Catholic Churches, efforts which have not been without positive results. Apostolic Letter Orientale lumen11 and Encyclical Letter unum sint12 have already written the elements and truth13 common Eastern and Western Christianity, and the desirable path follow the search for full communion between the Catholic Church and the Orthodox Churches, the light the greater understanding brought about the Second Vatican Council: "Today know that unity can achieved through the love God only the Churches want together, full respect for the traditions each and for necessary autonomy. know that this can take place only the basis the love Churches which feel increasingly called manifest the one Church Christ, born from one Baptism and from one Eucharist, and which want sisters".14 The deepening knowledge the doctrine the Church, brought about the Council and continuing since the Council, has marked out what can called new path the journey unity: the path the dialogue truth nourished and sustained the dialogue charity (cf. Eph 15).
The shift from underground existence has meant radical change the situation the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church: this Church has found itself facing the grave problems rebuilding the structures which had been completely deprived and, more generally, has had commit itself rediscovering itself fully, not only from within, but also relation the other Churches.
Thanks God for having enabled celebrate this jubilee with religious freedom regained. Thanks God also for the growth the dialogue charity, whereby significant progress has been made the road the much desired with the Orthodox Churches.
Numerous migrations and deportations have redrawn the religious geography those lands; many years official State atheism have profoundly affected people's minds; there still not enough clergy respond the immense needs religious and moral these are some the more dramatic challenges facing all the Churches.
the face these difficulties common witness charity required, order that the proclamation the Gospel may not impeded. said Apostolic Letter Orientale lumen, "today can co-operate proclaiming the Kingdom can become the upholders new divisions".15 May the Lord guide our feet into the way peace.
the new-found freedom cannot forget the persecution and martyrdom which the Churches that region, both Catholic and Orthodox, suffered their own flesh. This important aspect for the Church all times, recalled Apostolic Letter Tertio millennio adveniente.16 concerns particularly significant heritage the Churches Europe, which remain profoundly marked it: this needs studied the light the Word God.
Remembrance the martyrs cannot erased from the memory the Church humanity: whether victims the ideologies the East the West, all them are brought together fellowship the violence whereby hatred for the faith violated the dignity the human person, created God "in his image and likeness".
Pope John XXIII was fond repeating: "What unites much greater than what divides us". convinced that this attitude can great benefit all the Churches. More than years have gone since the Pope made this statement. this period time there have been many indications which suggest that Christians have made progress this direction. Eloquent signs this progress have been the fraternal meetings between Pope Paul and the Ecumenical Patriarch Athenagoras and those which myself have had with the Ecumenical Patriarchs Dimitrios and, more recently, Bartholomaios, and with other venerable Patriarchs the Churches the East. All this, together with the many initiatives involving meetings and dialogue which are being promoted everywhere the Church, encourages have hope: the Holy Spirit, the Spirit unity, does not cease work among Christians still separated from one another.
And yet human weakness and sin continue resist the Spirit unity. Sometimes one even has the impression that there are forces ready almost anything order slow down, and even put end to, the movement towards Christian unity. But cannot give in: daily must find the courage and strength, which one and the same time are the gift the Spirit and the result human effort, continue the path already undertaken.
10. recalling the Union Brest must ask ourselves what this event means today. was union which concerned only particular geographical region, but relevant for the entire field ecumenism. The Eastern Catholic Churches can make very important contribution ecumenism. The Council's Decree Orientalium Ecclesiarum reminds that "the Eastern Churches communion with the Apostolic See Rome have special role play promoting the unity all Christians, particularly Easterners, according the principles this sacred Synod's Decree Ecumenism: first all prayer, then the example their lives, religious fidelity ancient Eastern traditions, greater mutual knowledge, collaboration, and brotherly regard for objects and attitudes".20 From this follows that Eastern Catholics are commit themselves living profoundly what the Decree lays out. They are asked make confession faith full humility and gratitude the Holy Spirit, who guides the Church towards the fulfilment promised her the Redeemer the world.
11. Prayer will therefore the fundamental element which should mark the celebration this jubilee. Such prayer above all involves giving thanks for all that has been accomplished, down the centuries, commitment the Church's unity, and especially for the impulse given the search for unity result the Second Vatican Council.
This prayer one thanksgiving the Lord, who guides the unfolding history, for the situation new-found religious freedom which this jubilee being celebrated. also appeal the that may cause flourish everything which promotes unity, and may give courage and strength all those who commit themselves, according the guidelines the Council's Decree Unitatis redintegratio, this work blessed God. plea for the gift brotherly love, and for the forgiveness offences and injustices suffered the course history. petition that the power the living God will bring good even out the cruel and many-faceted evil caused acts human malice. This prayer also expresses hope for the future the ecumenical journey: the power God greater than all human weaknesses, whether old new. this jubilee the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church, the threshold the third millennium, marks step forward towards full Christian unity, this result will first all the work the Holy Spirit.
12. The jubilee celebrations should also time reflection. The Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church must first all ask itself what full communion with the Apostolic See meant for the past, and what will mean for the future. spirit humble thanksgiving, the Greek Catholic Church will give glory God, for its heroic fidelity the Successor Peter and, under the action the Holy Spirit, will understand that today this same fidelity commits fostering the unity all the Churches. This fidelity cost sufferings and martyrdom the past: this sacrifice offered God order implore the hoped-for union.
13. cannot fail entrust the yearning for full Christian unity the Mother Christ, she who ever present the work the Lord and his Church. Chapter Eight the Dogmatic Constitution Lumen gentium points her the one who goes before our earthly pilgrimage faith and tenderly present the Church which, the end the second millennium, working re-establish among all those who believe Christ that unity which the Lord wills for them. Because she the Mother the one Christ, she the Mother unity. Since Mary, the power the Holy Spirit, gave birth the Son God, who received from her his human body, she ardently wills the visible unity all believers who make the Mystical Body Christ. The veneration Mary, which unites East and West intimately, will serve, convinced, the cause unity.
The Most Holy Virgin, already present everywhere our midst both many sacred buildings and the life faith many families continuously speaks unity, unity for which she constantly intercedes. today, commemorating the Union Brest, recall the marvellous wealth veneration that the Christian people the Ukraine have offered the Mother God, cannot but draw from this admiration for the history, spirituality and prayer those peoples the consequences for unity which are closely linked those treasures.
Mary, who has inspired their trials fathers and mothers, young people, the sick and the aged; Mary, the column fire capable guiding many martyrs the faith, certainly work preparing the hoped-for union all Christians: the light this, the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church certainly has its own role play.
Mary the Church offers her thanks and asks her make share her concern for unity. With filial trust let abandon ourselves her, that may with her where God will all all.
you, dear Brothers and Sisters, impart Apostolic Blessing.
From the Vatican, November, Memorial Saint Josaphat, the year 1995, the eighteenth Pontificate.
Cf. Bullarium romanum V/2 (1594-1602), 87-92.
Cf. Welykyj, Documenta Pontificum Romanorum Historiam Ucrainae illustrantia, 257-259.
Cf. AAS (1946), 54-57. Those fears would disturbingly confirmed few years later, the same Pope precisely brought out the Encyclical Epistle Orientales Ecclesias (15 December 1952): AAS (1953), 7-10.

11) Cf. nn. 18-19; L'Osservatore Romano, 2-3 May 1995,
12) Cf. 12-14; L'Osservatore Romano, May 1995,
13) Cf. Second Vatican Ecumenical Council, Decree Ecumenism Unitatis redintegratio,
14) John Paul II, Apostolic Letter Orientale lumen May 1995), 20; L'Osservatore Romano, 2-3 May 1995,
15) 19; L'Osservatore Romano, 2-3 May 1995,

17) Apol. 50, 13: CCL 171.
18) John Paul II, Encyclical Letter unum sint,
19) Ibid. 50, loc.,

original text:
The Walt Disney Company Announces its Intention Launch Tender Offer for all Remaining Euro Disney Shares and mandatory buy-out the 95% threshold reached.
The Walt Disney Company released Press Statement this morning advising Disney’s intention purchase all the remaining shares Euro Disney S.C.A. and support €1.5 billion for the Euro Disney group companies enable the Group continue improvements Disneyland® Paris, reduce debt and increase liquidity.
The Walt Disney Company (“Disney“) announces the acquisition 90% Kingdom Holding Company’s (“Kingdom”) interest Euro Disney S.C.A. (“Euro Disney”), representing Euro Disney’s outstanding shares.
The proposed transaction will increase Disney’s interest Euro Disney 85.7% from 76.7%.
The price for the transaction €2.00 per share and will paid shares Disney common stock.
Disney also announces its intention make cash tender offer for all remaining outstanding shares Euro Disney price €2.00 per share, representing 67% premium Euro Disney’s trading price its close February 2017.
Subsequent the completion the tender offer, Disney committed support €1.5 billion for the Euro Disney group companies (“Group”) address the Group’s financial needs.
PARIS, Feb. 10, 2017 Today The Walt Disney Company (“Disney“) announced that will acquire through one its subsidiaries 90% Kingdom Holding Company’s (“Kingdom”) shares Euro Disney S.C.A. (“Euro Disney”) price €2.00 per share, increasing its interest Euro Disney 85.7%. Disney also announced that this subsidiary intends make cash tender offer for all remaining outstanding shares Euro Disney price €2.00 per share, representing 67% premium the trading price the close February 2017. Moreover, Disney has informed Euro Disney that committed support €1.5 billion for the Euro Disney group companies (“Group”) enable the Group continue improvements Disneyland® Paris, reduce debt and increase liquidity.
Euro Disney remains listed company, Disney would expect the take the form subscription the applicable Disney subsidiaries their pro-rata share €1.23 billion rights offering Euro Disney together with backstop (and the same price as) the rights offering one more such subsidiaries, ensuring that Euro Disney will able raise the full amount contemplated the rights offering, combined with direct €270 million cash investment equity the level Euro Disney Associés S.C.A., the main operating subsidiary Euro Disney, and contribution the proceeds the rights offering Euro Disney Euro Disney Associés S.C.A. maintain the ownership level Euro Disney Associés S.C.A. Euro Disney its current 82%. Proceeds would used enable the Group continue improvements Disneyland Paris, repay most all the Group’s indebtedness and increase liquidity. The rights offering described above would subject the prior approval Euro Disney’s shareholders shareholders’ meeting.
Euro Disney delisted, Disney would expect the the same amount and also consist entirely equity contributions the Group, but the allocation such contributions between Euro Disney and its subsidiaries could vary compared what described above. The proceeds would used for the same purposes described above.
The Walt Disney Company, together with its subsidiaries and affiliates, leading diversified international entertainment and media enterprise with the following business segments: media networks, parks and resorts, studio entertainment, and consumer products and interactive media. Disney Dow company and had annual revenues $55.6 billion its Fiscal Year 2016.
Founded 1980, Kingdom Holding Company publicly traded company, which was listed Tadawul (the Saudi Stock Exchange) 2007. Kingdom Holding Company one the world’s most successful and diversified business organizations, highly respected the field investments and recognized elite player regionally and
Euro Disney S.C.A. the holding company for Euro Disney Associés S.C.A., the primary operating company Disneyland® Paris. Disneyland Paris comprised the Disneyland® Park, the Walt Disney Studios® Park, seven themed hotels with approximately 5,800 rooms (excluding approximately 2,700 additional third-party rooms located the site), two convention centers, the Disney Village®, dining, shopping and entertainment center, and golf courses.C.A. also responsible for the development the 2,230-hectare property including and surrounding Disneyland Paris.C.A.’s shares are listed and traded Euronext Paris.
This press release includes statements, including statements within the meaning the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act 1995. These statements include, but are not limited to, statements regarding the proposed tender offer, all statements regarding The Walt Disney Company’s EDL Holding Company, LLC’s expected future financial position, results operations, cash flows, dividends, financing plans, business strategy, budgets, capital expenditures, competitive positions, growth opportunities, plans and objectives management, and statements containing the words such “anticipate,” “approximate,” “believe,” “plan,” “estimate,” “expect,” “project,” “could,” “would,” “should,” “will,” “intend,” “may,” “potential,” “upside,” and other similar expressions. Statements this press release concerning the business outlook future economic performance, anticipated profitability, revenues, expenses, dividends other financial items, and product services line growth The Walt Disney Company EDL Holding Company, LLC, together with other statements that are not historical facts, are statements that are estimates reflecting the best judgment The Walt Disney Company EDL Holding Company, LLC based upon currently available information.
Such statements are inherently uncertain, and stockholders and other potential investors must recognize that actual results may differ materially from The Walt Disney Company’s EDL Holding Company, LLC’s expectations result variety factors. Such statements are based upon management’s current expectations and are subject significant business, economic and competitive risks, uncertainties and contingencies, many which are unknown and many which The Walt Disney Company EDL Holding Company, LLC unable predict control. Such factors may cause The Walt Disney Company’s EDL Holding Company, LLC’s actual results, performance plans differ materially from any future results, performance plans expressed implied such statements. These risks and uncertainties include, but are not limited to, the risk factors discussed identified public filings that have been, will be, made The Walt Disney Company (or EDL Holding Company, LLC the case may be) with the French Autorité des marchés financiers (the “AMF”) and/or the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (the “SEC”) from time time. The Walt Disney Company and EDL Holding Company, LLC caution investors that any statements made The Walt Disney Company EDL Holding Company, LLC are not guarantees future performance. The Walt Disney Company and EDL Holding Company, LLC disclaim any obligation update any such factors announce publicly the results any revisions any the statements reflect future events developments.
The documentation relating the proposed tender offer filed will include the terms and conditions the tender offer, which will submitted the Autorité des marchés financiers. strongly recommended that investors and shareholders located France read, when available, the documentation relating the tender offer, well any amendments those documents, they will contain important information about The Walt Disney Company, EDL Holding Company, LLC, Euro Disney S.C.A. and the proposed transaction.
The release, publication distribution this press release certain countries may subject legal regulatory restrictions. Therefore, persons located countries where this press release released, published distributed must inform themselves about such restrictions and comply with them. The Walt Disney Company, EDL Holding Company, LLC and Euro Disney S.C.A. disclaim any for any violation such restrictions.
Press release announcing the intention EDL Holding Company, LLC (the “Bidder”) make tender offer €2.00 per Euro Disney share.
Filing with the AMF the Bidder’s draft offer document.
Public posting the Bidder’s draft offer document the AMF’s website and the website Euro Disney (the “Company”)
Publication the Company press release containing the main terms the draft Offer its website.
Filing with the AMF the Company’s draft Response Document.
Public posting the Company’s draft Response Document the AMF’s website and the Company’s website
Publication the Company press release containing the main terms its draft Response Document.
AMF’s clearance decision the Offer, which will indicate the visa number (i) the Offer Document and (ii) the Response Document.
Posting the AMF’s and the Company’s websites (i) the Bidder’s Offer Document, (ii) the Company’s Response Document, (iii) the “Other Information” document, containing legal, accounting and financial information regarding the Bidder and (iv) the “Other Information” document, containing legal, accounting and financial information regarding the Company.
Publication the Company press release informing the public the availability (i) the Bidder’s Offer Document, (ii) the Company’s Response Document, (iii) the “Other Information” document, containing legal, accounting and financial the Bidders and (iv) the “Other Information” document, containing legal, accounting and financial the Company.
Last day which the Offer open.
Publication notice announcing the final results the Offer the AMF.
Settlement and delivery the Offer.
applicable, mandatory buy-out and Delisting.
Author Salon MickeyPosted February 10, 2017 February 10, 2017 Categories Disneyland ParisTags Euro Disney S.C.A., Euro Disney Supervisory Board, Star Tours, The Walt Disney Company7 Comments The Walt Disney Company Announces its Intention Launch Tender Offer for all Remaining Euro Disney Shares and mandatory buy-out the 957 threshold reached.
Kingdom Holding Participates the Euro Disney injecting €49.2 Million.
The Kingdom Holding Company confirmed today (18 November 2015) that they have fully participated the Euro Disney S.C.A. Cash Tender Offer and Anti Dilution Mechanism part the rights issue.
The Saudi Arabian based Kingdom Holding Company chaired HRH Prince Alwaleed Bin Talal Bin Abdulaziz Alsaud has injected additional investment €49.2 million taking part the Euro Disney S.C.A. financial plan and therefore The Kingdom Holding Company maintains its 10% share Disneyland Paris.
Kingdom Holding Company with it’s 10% share now the resorts second largest shareholder after The Walt Disney Company which now owns 76.7% Disneyland Paris.
The Euro Disney S.C.A. Shareholders Club wrote shareholders yesterday remind them the commencement the anti dilution mechanism part the plan which scheduled start the October 2015 and will last until November 2015.
The anti dilution mechanism alows shareholders purchase additional shares from Euro Disney €1.25 per share prorata what they owned February 2015.
The AMF annouced yesterday that The Walt Disney Company now own 82.15% Euro Disney S.C.A. with holding 643,497,755 shares held via it’s three subsidiary companies EDL Holding Company, EDI SAS and EDLC SAS.
The below not for publication, release distribution directly indirectly the United States America, Canada, Australia Japan.
C.A. reminds its shareholders the possibility exercise, under certain conditions, right acquire Euro Disney S.C.A.’s shares, following the mandatory simplified tender offer, within the framework the plan.
Following the completion the Offer, and the final step the the Euro Disney S.C.A. group’s plan announced October 2014, shareholders having the status Eligible Shareholders (as defined below) have now the possibility exercise their rights acquire Company’s shares (the “RAS”).
(iii) October 2015, i.e., the day following the date settlement and delivery the Offer (on the positions October 2015 the evening observable October 2015 the morning).
further described below, the number RAS that will granted each Eligible Shareholder will pro rata its shareholding the Company’s share capital.
The information regarding both the allocation and the exercise the RAS will provided each Eligible Shareholder its authorized financial intermediary.
the close trading the Euronext yesterday (24 September 2015) The Walt Disney Company had increased it’s ownership Euro Disney S.C.A. 80.20%.
The Walt Disney Company now own total 628,259,291 shares Disneyland Pairs through their subsidiary the EDL Holding Company LLC.
This increase rise 1.30% August 2015 when TWDC held 78.90% stake the company. breakdown Euro Disney shareholders August 2015 available here.
With Phase the Euro Disney S.C.A. Cash Tender Offer ending September 2015, the results the cash tender offer will released September 2015.
Phase will then begin days later and will last for days. Phase the Euro Disney the anti dilution mechanism, which gives shareholders the right buy EDL shares €1.25 proportion what they already own.
EDL shares closed €1.31 the Euronext yesturday.
Following the ruling the Paris Court Appeal September 2015 the AMF announced today document number 215C1279 that Phase the Euro Disney S.C.A. public offering will closed September 2015.
The AMF’s decision follows the Paris Appeal Courts rejection the appeal made April CIMA (Charity Merger Arbitrage Fund) against the decision made the AMF authorize the Euro Disney mandatory cash tender offer which part the Disneyland Paris plan The Walt Disney Company.
The Euronext Paris will publish detailed timetable for the closure the offer due course.
Source: AMF and Association des Petits Porteurs d’Actions EuroDisney.

Following the completion the Offer, and the final step the the Euro Disney S.C.A. group’s plan announced October 2014, shareholders having the status Eligible Shareholders (as defined below) have now the possibility exercise their rights acquire Company’s shares (the “RAS”).
(iii) October 2015, i.e., the day following the date settlement and delivery the Offer (on the positions October 2015 the evening observable October 2015 the morning).
further described below, the number RAS that will granted each Eligible Shareholder will pro rata its shareholding the Company’s share capital.
The information regarding both the allocation and the exercise the RAS will provided each Eligible Shareholder its authorized financial intermediary.
the close trading the Euronext yesterday (24 September 2015) The Walt Disney Company had increased it’s ownership Euro Disney S.C.A. 80.20%.
The Walt Disney Company now own total 628,259,291 shares Disneyland Pairs through their subsidiary the EDL Holding Company LLC.
This increase rise 1.30% August 2015 when TWDC held 78.90% stake the company. breakdown Euro Disney shareholders August 2015 available here.
With Phase the Euro Disney S.C.A. Cash Tender Offer ending September 2015, the results the cash tender offer will released September 2015.
Phase will then begin days later and will last for days. Phase the Euro Disney the anti dilution mechanism, which gives shareholders the right buy EDL shares €1.25 proportion what they already own.
EDL shares closed €1.31 the Euronext yesturday.
Following the ruling the Paris Court Appeal September 2015 the AMF announced today document number 215C1279 that Phase the Euro Disney S.C.A. public offering will closed September 2015.
The AMF’s decision follows the Paris Appeal Courts rejection the appeal made April CIMA (Charity Merger Arbitrage Fund) against the decision made the AMF authorize the Euro Disney mandatory cash tender offer which part the Disneyland Paris plan The Walt Disney Company.
The Euronext Paris will publish detailed timetable for the closure the offer due course.
Source: AMF and Association des Petits Porteurs d’Actions EuroDisney.

original text:
your personal folders, you can create your own folders and customize view options based the contents. the toolbar the Pictures and Music folders, Windows provides buttons with file management activities specifically related the contents the folder, such Slide Show the Pictures folder, Play All the Music folders. When you create new folder, you can customize for documents, pictures, music, and videos applying folder template, which collection folder tasks and viewing options. When you apply template folder, you apply specific features the folder, such specialized tasks and viewing options for working with documents, pictures, music, and videos.
Click the Customize tab for folder.
Click the Optimize this folder for list arrow, and then select the type folder you want: General Items, Documents, Pictures, Videos, Music.
Select the Also apply this template all subfolders check box apply the option.
select picture for display the folder icon, click Choose File.
restore the default picture for the folder, click Restore Default.
See “Customizing the Taskbar” page 118 for information modifying the taskbar.

May Deadline for camp applications. After this date, contact the camp office about openings (please don't hesitate---we may have some!). Camp application and brochure are our link the left column for the 2019 Brochure and Application.
May Deadline for scholarship applications. desire help every child attend camp and offer scholarships (most are partial) based financial need. However, our application deadline firm; are unable offer scholarships after funds are disbursed.
May Auditions for camp. These are placement auditions only but very important!! Auditions are from 1:00 5:00 Immanuel Lutheran Church, 909 Market St. You will receive audition time after your application has been processed; please watch your e-mail.
Note: Campers who not currently play instrument not need audition.
June Deadline for payment the balance due for camp tuition.
June and June Concerts for Camp Allegro and Camp Musica (all campers are expected participate our concerts; please plan your schedule accordingly). Kinderlab concert Friday, June 12:15.
